chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1868 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.9419/2018 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27-10-2022 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. It appears that instant petition was filed on 02-11-2018, and thereafter, the petitioner has not pursued the matter diligently. Even otherwise, the grievance of the petitioner is redressable by the Electric Inspector; hence, this petition is disposed of along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the relevant forum for redressal of his grievance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
